texto: Well, I just don’t want you to think that this piece of shit is anything other than a pathetic, human defect. Nothing more. Not a monster, not a bogeyman. Nothing but another reason to feel better about yourself. Understand that it’s just a person - not worth devoting any nightmares to.
explicacao: Citação de Jhonen Vásquez sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “Well, I just don’t want you to think that this piece of shit is anything other than a pathetic, h…” articula autoestima, bogeyman, cynical em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

Nothing but another reason to feel better about yourself. Understand that it’s just a person - not worth devoting any nightmares to.

texto: Sometimes...you can cry until there's nothing wet in you. You can scream and curse to where your throat rebels and ruptures. You can pray, all you want, to whatever god you think will listen. And, still it makes no difference. It goes on, with no sign as to when it might release you. And you know that if it ever did relent...it would not be because it cared.
explicacao: Citação de Jhonen Vásquez sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Sometimes...you can cry until there's nothing wet in you. You can scream and curse to where your …” articula reflexao, despair, sometimes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: Sometimes...you can cry until there's nothing wet in you. You can scream and curse to where your throat rebels and ruptures. You can pray, all you want, to whatever god you think will listen. And, still it makes no difference. It goes on, with no sign as to when it might release you. And you know that if it ever did relent...it would not be because it cared.

texto: Nothing quite brings out the zest for life in a person like the thought of their impending death
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jhonen Vásquez: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Nothing quite brings out the zest for life in a person like the thought of their impending death” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, death-and-dying, nothing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e termino.
